tail.note: unconstrained match false-peaked at 1.30 (long thin kernel on the whole body strip); constrained to the anchor tail region best fit 0.45-0.55, biased low by partial visibility — true factor ~0.55-0.7, i.e. drawn ~1.5-1.8x. Shape is correct (thick curved taper); normalize at slice.

_method: zero-mean matched filter vs on-sheet anchor, stubs color-stripped, 2x downscale; scale = factor applied to the PIECE to fit the anchor (piece drawn larger when < 1)
_anchor_vs_true_master: creature bbox aspect: anchor 2.67 vs approved master 2.63 (within 1.5%) — the anchor is proportionally honest
